stemHtml: ATC pass the following message: "Fastair 345 traffic 1 o clock, 3 miles opposite track, 600 ft above and climbing". The pilot does not have the traffic in sight. What should be his/her response?

options.a: "Traffic 1 o clock, 3 miles opposite track. 600 ft and descending. Looking for the traffic Fastair 345"
options.b: "Fastair 345 traffic 1 o clock, 3 miles opposite track. I do not have the traffic in sight"
options.c: "Traffic 1 o clock, 3 miles opposite track. Negative traffic. Fastair 345"
